Patch Set 5: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

(6 inline comments)

Some minor cleanups if patch is refreshed. 

Di, Fan Yong, can you please inspect. In particular, this patch is removing what is labelled as remote directory handling and I don't want this to break DNE.

Patch Set 5:

so I read this as we need to somehow trigger a DNE test for this patchset somehow?

Patch Set 5: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

(4 inline comments)

This patch also needs better comments in the tricky places, and I am having doubts about the replacement logic for the lookup code vs dir rename after open - please expand on this or drop that part.

Patch Set 5:

I thought that the lock matching was improved Di that it could match multiple bits on separate locks?  This was done by CEA for HSM I think.
Uploaded patch set 6.

Patch Set 6:

Build Started http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/18705/

Patch Set 6:

I decided to split this patch into multiple parts.

The readdir buffer optimization was separated into http://review.whamcloud.com/7909

Teh main part of this patch remains: the PR->CR lock check in the get_dir_page aand then the revalidate lock check revalidate with a big comment, bringing these parts into a shape very similarto what we have in b1_8.
I do not think I agree with mdc_enqueue call conversion to mdc_intent_lock in get_dir_page, so I reverted it and all related bits as unnecessary.

I also added another patch to not pass real parent in case of getattr by fid RPCs as pointless, both fids are now passed as the child fid - http://review.whamcloud.com/7910

Patch Set 6: Verified

Build Successful 
 
http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/18705/ : SUCCESS

parents.subject: LU-3027 lov: to not modify lov lock when sublock is canceled

commit.subject: LU-3240 mdc: Check for all attributes validity in revalidate
commit.message:
LU-3240 mdc: Check for all attributes validity in revalidate

GETATTR needs to return attributes protected by different bits, so
we need to ensure all we have locks with all of those bits, not
just UPDATE bit.

Xyratex-bug-id: MRP-1052
Signed-off-by: Alexey Lyashkov <alexey_lyashkov@xyratex.com>
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
Change-Id: I0e27a33341c424a8666bdbf3cdb83b1b4fe0058f
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/6460
Tested-by: Hudson
Tested-by: Maloo <whamcloud.maloo@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: wangdi <di.wang@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
